prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Shadowrun / Sixth World inspired cyberpunk urban-fantasy atlas for the terrain type diverse_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: a vast black ocean cyberpunk world of many island groups and microcontinents, megacorp arcology island-cities, barrens slum ports, Matrix access node hubs, smuggling docks, gang territory islands, awakened forest isles, toxic industrial atolls, dragon-owned enclaves, neon ferry routes and extraterritorial corporate platforms.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated cyberpunk atlas, dark neon cartography, rain-slicked perpetual night, holo-billboard glow, corporate light pollution, Matrix overlay hexagons, urban fantasy district-map aesthetic.
Composition/framing: tall portrait world map with unevenly distributed island clusters; include large island sprawls, tiny smuggler islets, crescent island arcs, black lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote artificial atolls, fragmented cliffs and microcontinents with no grid-like spacing; include digital compass, circuit border, sea routes, gang-zone markings, corporate icons and Matrix node overlays without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must vary strongly in size and shape, with realistic complex coastlines, broken shores, curved bays, peninsulas, polluted deltas, toxic estuaries, seawalls, artificial platforms and storm docks; show many climates and regions including awakened forests, deserts, mountain arcologies, toxic wetlands, industrial barrens, neon megacity sprawl and smuggling coastlines.
Avoid: evenly spaced islands, clean utopian sci-fi, cheerful tropical palette, medieval fantasy map, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
